'''Taisden''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] officer onboard the ''[[Glorious]]''. When [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ejagga Pakkpekatt]] volunteered to search for [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]; Taisden, along with [[Pleck]] and [[Bijo Hammax]], volunteered as well. Needless to say, they succeeded with the help of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
